phase1.explanation:
🤖 **Performance and memory management are crucial for app quality.**

**Memory leaks:**

| Cause | Fix |
|-------|-----|
| Static references | Use WeakReference |
| Inner classes | Use static inner classes |
| Handlers | Remove callbacks |
| Observers | Unregister |

**Performance tips:**

| Tip | Why |
|-----|-----|
| Lazy init | Avoid unnecessary work |
| Object reuse | Reduce allocations |
| Primitive types | Less memory |
| Efficient loops | Better performance |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Performance and memory matter for user experience."

phase2.errorMessage:
1. Static context → memory leak
2. Inner class → memory leak
3. No cleanup → memory leak
4. Heavy ViewModel → memory leak
5. String concatenation → poor performance
6. Boxed types → poor performance
